name: Al Azhar Syifa Budi Jakarta

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Tebet Utara I No.4, Tebet, Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Al Azhar Syifa Budi is the go-to for Muslim families in South Jakarta who want international qualifications with Islamic values.
paragraphs: Parents say Al Azhar Syifa Budi is the go-to for Muslim families in South Jakarta who want international qualifications with Islamic values.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$1.9K – US$7.8K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Tebet campus, Science laboratories, Libraries, Mosque, Sports facilities.
